stories.title: Create AGENTS.md with accurate, information-dense project documentation
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md documents the project purpose (CLIP ZSAD streaming anomaly detection)
AGENTS.md lists all key directories with their responsibilities
AGENTS.md documents the three experiment gates (setup smoke, first success A, paper gate)
AGENTS.md documents the common CSV schema
AGENTS.md documents which files are gitignored vs tracked
AGENTS.md documents the run commands: run_smoke.sh, build_paper.sh, setup_baselines.sh
AGENTS.md documents the wrapper interface contract
AGENTS.md does not fabricate baseline URLs or claim gates are passed
AGENTS.md references docs/experiment-prd.md for full detail
